programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ben Benjamin arrives at the Ricardos' apartment, Lucy mistakes Ben Benjamin, a Hollywood talent scout, for a burglar and nearly ruins Ricky's chance for a film career.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy travels with Ricky to Hollywood for his big screen test and gets excited about the possibility of living there. According to industry insiders, Ricky is a candidate for the lead role in "Don Juan".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Ricardo meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time and her efforts to be a gracious host turn disastrous. Lucy's inability to speak Spanish and her in-law's inability to understand Lucy's pantomime erects a wall of misunderstanding.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Despite the reservations of her husband, Lucy decides to help Fred pick out a birthday present for Ethel. She picks out a pair of toreador pants, which Ethel thinks are unflattering as well as too big.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo paces the floor, awaiting word from Hollywood about his screen test. Lucy can't use the phone for fear the line will be busy when Ben Benjamin tries to call for Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky, and Fred and Ethel are fed up with each other's annoying habits and decide they all need a break. They split up for a brief vacation and Lucy and Ethel decide they'll go to Palm Springs for a girls-only good time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's friend Caroline Abbleby decides she'll pay Lucy a visit while on her way to Hawaii, and can't wait for Lucy to introduce her to all the stars she has supposedly befriended. Lucy's only solution is to trick her friend and set the stage for deceit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Caroline Appleby is visiting from New York and is excited to see all the stars Lucy had promised. Of course Lucy exaggerated her access to celebrities but plans on fooling her nearsighted friend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: The nation of Carib is in political upheaval, and Fujiko is in the thick of the action, naturally. What is she doing posing as a reporter? Will revolutionary Philadel Kest win her heart where Lupin has failed? And what is Goemon doing on that fighter jet?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A fortune-teller supposedly able to predict his clients' deaths is for some reason seeking out Lupin's prior victims and giving them some very disturbing readings. What's the connection to Fujiko Mine, and how far will she go to see this job through?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Magical realism plus human trafficking plus Lupin and Daisuke Jigen plus a spa vacation plus Fujiko off the deep end equals... Well, you'll just have to find out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Count Almeida has a job for Lupin, and he's not about to take no for an answer. When Lupin and Zenigata both separately make their way to the Count's villa seeking answers, the trail of clues leads to a ghost town with just one inhabitant.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A recent string of particularly flashy thefts has been tied to Fujiko Mine, who seems to have taken to sending written warnings to the police just like Lupin does. But if you ask Inspector Zenigata, something smells fishy about the whole thing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Oscar's body is missing, girls are being kidnapped all over the world, and Lupin still hasn't made good on his threat to steal Fujiko Mine. There's only one thing to do: It's time to pay a visit to one Count Luís Yu Almeida.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: In the season finale, all the players have finally come together, and it's time to see how the tale ends.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is hired by Gaston to retrieve a painting, and manages to do so easily enough... except the painting has a strange resemblance to a real Picasso piece, forcing Lupin to examine the truth behind why he was hired.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin visits Gaston's grave. There he meets the elderly Camille, with who he goes out for a drink when the pub's phone begins to ring. On the other end of the line is the supposedly dead Gaston.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot, and Albert gets his hands on the notebook. Lupin is saved by Jigen and Goemon and manages to survive his injuries under care. He then explains his past with Albert and how they know each other.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: After learning the shocking truth about Jose's terrifying plot, Lupin heads to Jose's headquarters with Albert, his old thieving comrade. Jigen and Goemon fight off the heaviest opposition while Lupin and Albert head into the heart of the enemy territory.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: To steal the fortune of the Drug King Pablo, the gang heads to South America with Fujiko. As Fujiko distracts the target, Lupin picks off the remains of Pablo's guards while making his way through the jungle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: In a rural town in France, full of cosplayers. Within the town celebrating a pop-cultural event is Goemon. Next to the inn, he decides to keep watch at is Chloé's Bistro. Chloé is exactly the woman Goemon was looking for Lupin's current target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Having enrolled at the Annecy School for Girls, Ami encounters a strange girl in the garden who aims her bow at a crow. The girl is Dolma, the princess of the Kingdom of Padar. Having no friends, Ami finds herself opening up to the odd Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Princess Dolma, please save Padar." With that request, Dolma is taken home. Lupin follows shortly, and Ami decides to accompany Fujiko to Padar in order to save Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is pierced by Dolma's arrow. Ami and Fujiko take Lupin and escape, hiding in a deserted building. The three of them decide to flee, with Lupin badly injured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Padar sinks into chaos because of the civil war, but things take a sudden turn when the Shake Hands company gets involved. A proclamation by the king is posted online, proving him to be alive.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: I want you to find out who killed my husband." Three years ago, someone shot Count Maupassant to death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special

programme.desc: Fred Williams and Dave Chappelle hitch a small boat to the back of a Yamaha Wolverine UTV and head to New Mexico; the plan is to explore the Southern Rockies, find a nice mountain lake, and maybe catch some trout, but that might not be it.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: Fred Williams and Dave Chappelle decide to build a budget bouncer from a Dodge Truck with a V-10 engine, calling it the "Rock Viper.

programme.title: Speed Is the New Black
programme.desc: The crew is challenged to bring a perfectly running, near-flawless Porsche and a new Cadillac CTS-V to the next level.

programme.title: Speed Is the New Black
programme.desc: Noah has his hands full modifying a 1957 Chevy Bel Air for a married couple with two separate visions; a mystery client has high demands for turning a 1969 Camaro into a luxury ride.

programme.title: Head 2 Head
programme.desc: Iconic cars go against one another in a battle for bragging rights.

programme.title: Head 2 Head Drag Race
programme.desc: Exploring whether BMW maintains the title of undisputed fast sedan king.

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time
programme.desc: Rule benders and sneaky geniuses: these are stories of creative risk takers who know that sometimes you have to break the rules to be the hero.

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time
programme.desc: There are a million ways to modify a car, but few like these stories. From a manufacturer creating a narrow-use case spec, to one guy making a complete unicorn in his garage, we celebrate some forgotten oddballs of the mod world.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: Steve returns to Fresno, California, turning up buried treasures and looking for potential projects for the gang at Roadkill; along the way, he shares some lessons on engine cooling and big-block history.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: Steve is at Desert Valley Auto Parts in Phoenix and strikes gold in the form of a rusty 1964 Ford Galaxie XL; the next stop for that car is over at Roadkill; he also uncovers some muscle from Chevy, Oldsmobile and Buick.

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programme.desc: Shorty takes on the huge challenge of making a Vietnam veteran's long-bed '69 C10 cool; he hopes to achieve that by taking the truck back to stock, with original two-tone paint and moldings, a new stance, updated interior and new wheels.

programme.title: Runs Good
programme.desc: A shop owner's crew builds a SR20-powered Ford Ranger Urban Assault Vehicle, but when the turbo gives out, he knows it needed to go before it become more of a distraction; Aaron fixes the reliability issues; Dan and Shea go in on suspension.

programme.title: An Unexpected Love
programme.desc: Separated from her husband, a woman (Leslie Hope) gets a job at a real-estate agency and falls in love with her lesbian boss (Wendy Crewson).

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Brilliant doctor and mother Deborah Green had the epitome of a picture-perfect life with two children, an adoring husband and a beautiful house in an opulent neighborhood.

programme.title: Circle of Deception
programme.desc: A small island community is turned upside down when one of the town's citizens, Russel Douglas, is found dead the day after Christmas.

programme.title: Hurricane Season

programme.title: Gamer
programme.desc: A death-row inmate (Gerard Butler) is caught between the inventor (Michael C. Hall) of a deadly online game and a group that opposes the inventor's high-tech slavery.

programme.title: Hunter Killer
programme.desc: American submarine Capt. Joe Glass learns that a secret Russian coup is in the offing. With crew and country on the line, Glass must assemble an elite group of Navy SEALs to sneak through enemy waters and rescue the kidnapped Russian president.

programme.title: Shattered
programme.desc: A lonely tech millionaire develops a passionate relationship with a charming and sexy woman. However, her odd behavior makes him suspect that she has more sinister intentions, especially when her roommate dies under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Den of Thieves
programme.desc: An elite unit of the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department squares off against a crew of ex-military men who hatch an elaborate plan for a seemingly impossible heist -- the city's Federal Reserve Bank.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair
programme.desc: An adventure of a millionaire playboy who steals a priceless work of art and then strikes up a fiery romance with the brilliant female insurance investigator who is on to his game.

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: A 14th-century Crusader returns to a homeland devastated by the Black Plague. A beleaguered church commands the knight to transport an accused witch to a remote abbey, where monks will perform a ritual in hopes of ending the pestilence.

programme.title: ABCs of Death 2

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth

programme.desc: Hoping to win a songwriting contest, Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound or try to make something that the whole world will love.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs; Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together; when Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly y Sam compiten con Freddie y Spencer para crear el mejor plan para atraer a más espectadores a la transmisión por Internet.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: El grupo quieren que su programa de Internet sea calificado por Nevelocity, un sitio popular, pero Carly descubre que es manejado por un chico de 11 años que quiere salir con ella.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: El abuelo de Carly y Spencer realiza una visita sorpresa, pero él está preocupado porque Spencer es muy irresponsable para ser el tutor de Carly.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly decide hacer un webcast que muestra lo que los profesores hacen cuando no están en la escuela.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, y Freddie intentan romper el récord mundial de la transmisión por Internet más extensa. Para hacerlo, iCarly tendrá que transmitirlo durante 24 horas seguidas.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Una fanática, Valerie, le pide una cita a Freddie. La cita resulta muy bien y Freddie empieza a filmar el propio programa de Internet de Valerie, y se encuentra atrapado entre sus mejores amigos y su nueva novia.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly invita al héroe artístico de Spencer, Harry Joyner, para que revise el trabajo de Spencer. Cuando Harry califica como inexperto al trabajo de Spencer, él siente que su vida ha perdido su razón de ser.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: La mejor fanática de Carly llega a una transmisión en vivo del programa; Spencer descubre que su nueva banda le permite tocar los tambores para que él pueda practicar en su departamento.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly y San deciden incubar pollos para proyecto de ciencia.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly le hace a Sam una playera para conmemorar el aniversario de su amistad; Spencer construye una máquina para alimentar a los peces.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly le pide a sus fanáticos que le manden videos bailando - pero cuando llegan miles, Carly, Sam y Freddie se quedan dormidos intentarlos ver todos.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie hacen su webcast de Halloween desde un apartamento que se rumora estar embrujado.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie deben frustrar el plan de Nevel para piratear a iCarly; Plain White T's interpreta "Our Time Now".

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Sam es detenido en la noche del show espectacular en la Web número 50 de iCarly, Carly y Freddie hacen lo imposible por también ser detenidos.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie son invitados a Daka Headquarters en donde les ofrecen una gran suma de dinero por promocionar los nuevos zapatos Daka, los Tech-Foot. Pero los zapatos son terribles.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Carly obtiene una B en historia, Sam cambia la calificación de Carly a una A. Carly y Freddie idean un plan para entrar al sistema computacional y restaurar las calificaciones reales.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: La emoción del grupo por estar en la televisión disminuye después de que la cadena hacer grandes cambios al programa.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam y su nuevo novio son inseparables; Spencer intenta crear una película de animación de arcilla.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Dos detectives deciden usar el ático de Carly y Spencer para una vigilancia; Freddie pierde una apuesta con Sam.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam y Freddie están molestos cuando Carly recibe la oferta de una beca completa para una escuela privada de élite; Spencer crea un campo de golf miniatura.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie necesita pasar algo de tiempo con los chicos por lo que sale con Spencer para ir a la esgrima. Las cosas se complican cuando Spencer involucra a Freddie en un combate con un profesional.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A Gibby le gusta una chica de su clase, pero es demasiado tímido para proponerle una cita, por lo que los chicos deciden ayudarlo organizando un programa de citas en iCarly. Mientras tanto, Spencer busca novia en Internet.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: La Srita. Ackerman termina con su novio, provoca una pelea con sus alumnos. Pero una visita de Spencer para resolver el conflicto se transforma en una cita.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: En el primero de este especial de tres partes, el show de Carly es invitado a Japón para competir por los Premios iWeb - una competencia internacional que celebra a lo mejor del Internet.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Después de un accidentado vuelo y de un salto imprevisto, Carly y el grupo se hacen amigos del programa japonés rival. Sin embargo, las cosas se complican cuando sus `amigos' japoneses intentan sacar de la competencia a iCarly.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Perdidos en una tierra extranjera, Carly, Sam y Freddie deben llegar a la premiación y exponer las trampas de quienes los traicionaron.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly y Sam ambas se enamoran del amigo de Freddie, Shane, para decidir quién saldrá con él las chicas intentan lograr que él bese a una de ellas.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly debe intervenir cuando Spencer se vuelve adicto a un juego de video; Sam engaña a Freddie haciéndole creer que él tiene mala suerte.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie acusa a Sam de no pagar el dinero que tomó prestado; Spencer ayuda a una niña pequeña a vender chocolates.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Lewbert resulta herido durante una presentación, el grupo intenta ayudarlo a recuperar su salud; Spencer molesta a los camioneros.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Carly, Sam, y Spencer llevan a Freddie a su tienda de pays favorita, ellos se enteran que el propietario ha fallecido. Y al parecer sus recetan se han perdido para siempre.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly se enfada con Spencer porque su escultura de árbol de navidad magnético se ha incendiado y ha quemado todos los regalos de las fiestas. Carly desea tener un hermano normal y su petición se cumple, pero ciertos deseos pueden ser muy peligrosos.

programme.desc: Tony is ready to discover what it is that makes Laos so unique.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Curtis sat down with his mother Telisha, and told her that he is trying to have a baby but Telisha was shocked and terrified because Curtis is only 13 years old! Curtis insists he is ready to be a father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Eugene believes that Shannon cheated on him that he has even broken into her home to setup recording devices. Next, Deontae left Kapreece after she had her baby and denied fatherhood. Will the lie detector results mend or break these relationships?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sabrionna found many photos, videos, and messages from other women on her husband Anthony's phone. He claims she cheated with his best friend! Then, pregnant Andrea suspects Tim has been unfaithful because she found another woman's purse in his car!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Deon believes that Cassandra has been having sex with Josh and that she may be pregnant with his child! Next, Shawn believes his wife, Jamie, cheated on him with his brother. Jamie blacked out during a night of drinking and does not remember.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The truth comes out on today's Jerry Springer Show! Michelle tells her lover David that she's really a man. Speedy fights to win his ex-girlfriend back from her new lover Tom.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Je’nier has a wild secret to share with Preston. Then, it’s Nikki and Nikky going after one man! Will Nikki or Nikky win Kevin’s heart? Does Kevin deserve either’s love?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sheene’s got a secret to reveal to Derrick that may threaten their relationship. Tabitha thinks her man TJ might be cheating again. Plus, Xeo and James are going head to head for the same woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jamie is here to tell his ex-lover that he actually left her for a guy! Next Amy says her ex-boyfriend is a chronic cheater and she wants nothing to do with him. Then Jasmine is here to teII her boyfriend that she's really a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Pimp Hotlanta will set Nika straight about their relationship. Stephanie confronts her pal Erika for having sex with her man. Gloria was crushed when she found out that her sister stole her man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Unemployed Sebastian has been badgering his girlfriend Dee to take up any kind of work. Later Steve tells his girlfriend that he's secretly been videotaping and broadcasting them over the Internet!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife. Next Michelle is here to dump her lover for her ex-boyfriend, Frankie. Later, Erikka lives with her boyfriend but her heart belongs to her friend, Larry.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michael cheated on his wife Alecia with a stripper who may now be pregnant. Sarah confronts a stripper named Amy who she says slept with her man. Missy is here to lay down the laws of the strip club.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John is cheating on his wife Destinee with Cici, but Cici's got some secrets too. Then, Lala drops a bombshell on her man. Plus Michael and his wife Tayliana both have secrets to reveal to each other.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Friends and family refuse to accept same-sex marriage! Martin won’t let his son marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back, but he’s in love with a man! Who has the final say?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: A battle of brides on today’s Jerry Springer Show. Nicole issues an ultimatum to her lover: Dump her or lose me. Jerry watches as sparks fly on today’s show!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Johnny wants his girlfriend Aimee to accept him for who he is. Then, Maya comes on the show to confront her boyfriend Eric about his tendencies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Penny busted her super-sized husband, Chris, and her cousin, Christy, together. Next Rovin is here to confront her best friend for sleeping with Chucky, Robin's boyfriend. But Chucky shocks both women when he introduces them to his new lover, Arthur!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Holiday food fights, proposals, poetry and North Pole dancers, this episode has it all.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Khloe está dispuesta a contarle a Jamal que quizá no sea la mujer que él cree que es. Nick ha venido a confrontar a su esposa Barbara y al hombre con el que se ha estado acostando, Jason.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carlton ha venido a revelarle a su novia que lleva una doble vida gay. Además, Tom Bergeron de "Bailando con las Estrellas" de la TV hará de juez famoso en un concurso de baile. Luego, Crystal le revela a su marido, Bobby, su infidelidad.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake se acostó con el prometido de su hermano Joe. Después, Danny dice que dejará a su prometida Heather por una dama de compañía profesional llamada Chelsi. Además, hay más historias de matrimonios disparatados.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kiki y Kat eran compañeras de trabajo que se enamoraron. ¡Pero ahora Kat dejará a Kiki por un hombre! Después, Cedric viene a decirle a su novia que quiere llevar su relación a otro nivel... y a otra persona.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Ernesto y Mariana logran disimular para que no sepa la verdad Ricardo sobre el hecho de que Ernesto no sea su verdadero padre. Martin lleva a Ernesto a ver a Leonora.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana abofetea a Natalia como una advertencia de que no le diga a Ricky que él no es el hijo de Ernesto. Natalia la amenaza con que muy pronto ella se irá con Ricky.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy lleva a Natalia a empujones para sacarle la verdad. Ella intenta decirle la verdad a cambio de dinero, pero Willy no cae en chantajes. Luego inventó que Valentín la había violado.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se presenta en la oficina de Rosaura, con la intención de pedirle un préstamo para salvar su hacienda. Rosaura, sorprendida, le dice que no entiende porque tiene que buscar a ella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura es interrogada por el Comisario, quien de inmediato se da cuenta que ella está mintiendo al ver la forma en la que se contradice en sus declaraciones.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la comisaría, Rosaura es arduamente interrogada por el comisario, quien sospecha de su inocencia. Él la presiona a decir la verdad.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Al saber la verdad sobre la inocencia de Rosaura, Iván conversa con Karina y intenta convencerla de entregarse a la policía para que asuma su culpa.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Paco visita a Gaviota en el hospital y le hace reclamos por lo que está sucediendo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana va a la casa de Octavia para reclamarle por todos sus actos contra su familia. Octavia y Bruna intentan humillarla, pero se llevan una sorpresa ante la nueva actitud de Diana.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana toma el puesto de su madre temporalmente en la fábrica y es bienvenida por sus trabajadores con un mensaje que la deja desconcertada.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano le agradece nuevamente a Camila todas las atenciones que tiene para con él, pero ella aprovecha para besarlo y pedirle que se quede con ella.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Margot, Willy invita a Mariana y Martin a una cena para celebrar el cobro de la herencia y molestar a Gertrudis. Morgana inventa un encuentro con una amiga y Luciano le entrega las llaves de la caja fuerte.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Ernesto y Mariana logran disimular para que no sepa la verdad Ricardo sobre el hecho de que Ernesto no sea su verdadero padre. Martin lleva a Ernesto a ver a Leonora.

programme.desc: A Wisconsin school teacher follows his dream of owning a two-ton Asian elephant but isn't prepared for the inevitable. Doug Terranova, a former circus performer, wants his young daughters to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Ecuador
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges, making a bow and arrow, and showing which plants are poisonous.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Kimberly, Australia
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in the harsh Australian outback by taking extreme measures to avoid sunstroke, finding food, and avoiding the deadly 'Salties' - saltwater crocodiles.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Mexico
programme.desc: In Mexico's Copper Canyon Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive by using traditional cave shelters, fishing without lines or nets, and finding scorpions and grubs to eat.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Iceland
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls shows how to survive in Iceland's Arctic conditions. Bear demonstrates how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels, and avoid frostbite. Half a million tourists visit every year to see the freezing glaciers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt...

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late-model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league softball team.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty.

programme.title: Bill & Ted Face the Music
programme.desc: Yet to fulfill their rock and roll destiny, the stakes are higher than ever for the now middle-aged Bill and Ted who set out on a new adventure when a visitor from the future warns them that only their song can save life as we know it.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: In this riotous spin on the mismatched buddy movie, an uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the gregarious widow (Sofía Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen!

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: After going 'overboard' on his yacht, a spoiled, rich playboy (Eugenio Derbez) with amnesia is convinced by a single mother (Ana Faris) that he is her husband and is set to work for the first time in his life! But can a lie keep a new love together?

programme.title: Licorice Pizza
programme.desc: Licorice Pizza' is the story of Alana Kane and Gary Valentine growing up, running around and falling in love in the San Fernando Valley, 1973. Written and Directed by Paul Thomas Anderson, the film tracks the treacherous navigation of first love.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Undoubtedly the funniest film ever made about rock and roll, Rob Reiner's satire about an over-the-hill heavy metal band is a priceless look at the music business and it's madness.

programme.title: Airplane!
programme.desc: Voted “one of the 10 funniest movies ever made” by the American Film Institute, “Airplane!” is a masterpiece of off-the-wall comedy.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models learn to strike an extreme pose from a contortionist and are put to the test in a high fashion challenge with an extravagant prize.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens' acting chops are tested in parody movie sequels of RuPaul's favorite movies. Pussycat Doll Nicole Scherzinger guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens must perform a live stand-up comedy act in front of an audience of judgmental drag queens. Ross Mathews returns to guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens design and market drag-influenced products. Entrepreneur Marcus Lemonis (CNBC's The Profit) co-stars, and comedian Graham Norton guest judges.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: An epic match-up featuring SWAT, the elite special forces of U.S. law enforcement, against Germany's GSG-9, the ultra-secretive paramilitary arm of the German Police.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Attila the Hun, the barbarian horseman who terrorized Europe, battles Alexander the Great, history's greatest military tactician.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Meet the ten brave participants on ALONE Season 3 and learn about the extreme location at the edge of the world.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Seven family member pairs are dropped miles apart on Northern Vancouver Island and must find each other. To win the $500,000 prize, they must survive the island's unforgiving terrain and deadly predators.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are taken outdoors where they struggle to forge a blade in the noonday sun. In the final round, two smiths must create the ultimate wilderness weapon: the German Sawback Hunting Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: In a grueling Forged In Fire first, four bladesmiths must forge not just one, but three knives from railroad spikes in only three hours. Time management is essential for hammering out three functional knives that can withstand a brutal round of testing.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge a fully functional serrated knife using steel from hand scissors. After two rounds, the final two competitors must create a challenging weapon from history: the Sengese.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths take a shot at forging a signature blade from the steel rings of a whiskey barrel. After an intense round of testing, the final two smiths head home to forge an instrument of Chinese warfare: the Qinglong Ji.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A red carpet challenge with Janice Dickinson leaves some of the girls speechless.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra picks up her camera for a scary impromptu photo shoot.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team tries to locate the son of a billionaire who disappears after piloting a small plane that crashes in the woods. Recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL appears as Kim Marcus.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing reporter who recently wrote an exposé about a corrupt politician. NICHOLLE TOM ("The Nanny") and ADAM KAUFMAN guest star.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team tries to locate a teenager who was last seen in an amateur video being psychologically tormented by an unseen abductor.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack searches for his daughter Hannah's (VANESSA MARANO) boyfriend after he runs away from home. Recurring guest star ADAM KAUFMAN appears as Brian Donovan.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a man who disappears after a late-night dive, and Danny and Elena take their relationship to another level. MARTIN LANDAU and ADAM KAUFMAN guest star.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his team investigate the case of a 28-year-old marketing executive, Maggie Cartwright, who seems to have simply walked away from her life, leaving everything behind.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his team search for an 11-year-old boy, Gabe (DAVID HENRIE), who disappears from a subway station en route to Yankee Stadium for what was to be his birthday celebration.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Duncan Muller realizes that he needs to go back into a store to retrieve his credit card. After he walks away, his wife's car speeds off, leaving a bystander injured.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The agents must find a woman, Eve, who changes her appearance to suit whatever modeling or acting job she is seeking. No one seems to know Eve well, including her roommate.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his squad search for 17-year-old Andy Deaver, who was last seen by the charismatic headmaster of Spalding Academy, the private boarding school Andy attends.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a controversial senior leader from Egypt comes to New York for a heart transplant, OA struggles to balance his personal opinion with his professional duty when he is assigned to the security detail.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a decorated FBI agent is murdered, the team investigates and uncovers the man who led a double life.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A woman with information about the death of Maggie's husband is abducted leading the team to uncover a criminal operation larger than anyone imagined.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a bomb detonates at a restaurant in Queens, the case becomes personal for OA, who grew up eating there.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Shottas
programme.desc: Two young men from Jamaica climb to the top of the criminal world in Miami, with a constant presence of drugs, extortion, and deceit.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The story of Richard Kuklinski, the notorious contract killer and family man. When finally arrested in 1986, neither his wife nor daughters had any clue about his real profession.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.
When a student writes the police code for homicide, 187, inside a textbook owned by teacher Trevor Garfield, he feels threatened.

programme.title: Undisputed
programme.desc: When the world's heavyweight champion is sent to prison, everything points to an inevitable showdown with the penitentiary's undefeated champ. But to make sure the meeting will happen, a former mob boss must call in favors from the outside world.

programme.title: Layer Cake
programme.desc: Planning to retire and begin a new life, Mr. X (Daniel Craig, Lara Croft: Tomb Raider), a successful West End drug dealer, has been asked for one last favor: to negotiate the sale of one million hits of Ecstasy. Rated: R

programme.title: Earth Girls Are Easy
programme.desc: Three aliens (Jim Carrey, Damon Wayans, and Jeff Goldblum) crash-land in Los Angeles' San Fernando Valley. A manicurist (Geena Davis) and her boss (the wacky Julie Brown) befriend the threesome, give them makeovers and show them the town.

programme.title: Popeye
programme.desc: The legendary, beloved anvil-armed sailor of the seven seas comes magically to life in this delightful musical, starring Robin Williams as Popeye, who meets all challenges with the unshakable philosophy, "I yam what I yam and that's all that I yam.

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch-rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Tank Girl
programme.desc: In this laugh-a-minute, futuristic Thriller, a mega-villain controls the world's water supply, and it's up to Tank Girl and her outrageous cohorts to end his greedy reign.

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: Thelma & Louise
programme.desc: In one of the greatest road movies of all time, Geena Davis and Susan Sarandon ride to everlasting fame as two women who embark on a crime spree across the American southwest.

programme.title: Brian's Song
programme.desc: Based on the real-life relationship between teammates Brian Piccolo and Gale Sayers and the bond established when Piccolo discovers that he is dying.

programme.title: The Master
programme.desc: Haunted by his past, WW-II veteran and drifter Freddie Quell (Joaquin Phoenix) crosses paths with a mysterious movement led by The Master (Phillip Seymour Hoffman) and his wife (Amy Adams).

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: College drop-out Steve Jobs teams with childhood friend Steve ìWozî Wozniak to assemble the first Apple Computer in his parentsí garage. Driven by a relentless pursuit of excellence, Jobs transforms the world of computing at the cost of his personal life.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: Bugsy
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer who dreamed of Hollywood stardom, a crazed patriot who plotted against Mussolini, and the brilliant visionary who carved Las Vegas out of the dry Nevada desert, Bugsy had it all. Rating: R

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Hugo
programme.desc: Set in 1930s Paris, an orphan who lives in the walls of a train station is wrapped up in a mystery involving his late father and an automaton.

programme.title: Stargate
programme.desc: When an ancient Egyptian artifact is discovered, two men unlock its secret power as a portal through time and space.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Hugo
programme.desc: Set in 1930s Paris, an orphan who lives in the walls of a train station is wrapped up in a mystery involving his late father and an automaton.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Some say that Jalisco is the birthplace of Mariachi. Pati learns about the history, the instruments, and the meaning behind that beloved music that pulls at the heartstrings of so many Mexicans.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Hisohisa Koyama, an up-and-coming maestro of Japanese cuisine, challenges Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of pike conger.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The bad boy of French cuisine, Keiji Nakazawa, challenges Iron Chef Michiba in the battle of corn.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming hits up Hawai’i! Joining Ming is chef Issac Boncaco, the 2014 Maui Chef of the Year. With two unique takes on tuna, Issac and Ming talk shop and trade recipes as they create a delicious meal on the beautiful sands of Kama’ole Beach.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Coconuts, opah, and plantains are on the menu in Hawai’i. Chef Ed Kenney and Ming head to Ma’o Organic Farms to harvest ingredients and coconuts for a few exotic dish and drinks! Ming and Ed create two unique takes on traditional dishes.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming is in Maui with chef Lee Anne Wong. At Kako’o ‘Oiwi Farm, the two gather traditional Hawaiian ingredients, such as taro plants, edible ferns, and breadfruit to create a sumptuous meal celebrating the heritage of the islands.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming heads to Honolulu to join Mom and Dad in their kitchen for a family meal. Whipping up a few favorite dishes, the Tsai family trades laughs and stories – and more than a few family photos! – before sitting down to dinner on the lanai.

programme.title: Project Fire: Secret Steaks
programme.desc: Unlock the secrets of grilling lesser-known cuts of beef, including hanger steak, tri-tip, and Denver steak.

programme.title: Project Fire: Primal Grilling
programme.desc: Return to the roots of grilling with primal cuts of meat cooked over an open flame, such as lamb on a spit and caveman-style steaks.

programme.title: Project Fire: Tex Meets Mex

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le promete a su hija que no la abandonará jamás, Pepa inspecciona la nueva habitación de su amigo y amenaza a Fernando con denunciarlo por abuso. Los Reyes le dan la bienvenida a Sara.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo recibe a Aurora en sus brazos, impide que el doctor Max se quede con la bebé para sus propósitos, pero le miente a Soledad. Paquito anuncia que Alcides está vivo, pero tiene sus dudas.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad piensa que Hugo es Alcides y le confirma que es el padre de Aurora, para que no lastime a su bebé. Hugo está destrozado.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Esther y Antonia acusan a Úrsula y a Enrico de secuestrar a Aurora, Soledad los defiende delante del inspector Duarte. Beatriz mantiene oculto a su rehén y aumenta los niveles de tortura.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad amenaza a Alcides para que le regrese a su hija, ella sabe que Helena Burke la tiene. La búsqueda de Aurora despierta los más viles intereses en los enemigos de Alcides.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Confronted by a psychological Detour, teams try to avoid making a Freudian slip in the slick streets of Austria, and a hefty meal proves to be too big for some teams' stomachs.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stress of the Race begins to take its toll when a Double U-Turn is revealed, and one Team struggles to consume a local delicacy while others become acquainted with Swiss hospitality.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams brave bone-chilling temperatures as they come face-to-face with the world famous Matterhorn, and tempers flare in the most intense argument of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams mix it up in Brazil where Racers cry out in pain during a hairy situation as this season comes down to a race to the finish line when one Team will be crowned the winners and receive the 1 million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning The Amazing Race sets off for a new global adventure as Teams depart for Taipei, Taiwan. Plus, one team's position in the game is put in serious jeopardy when they lose their passport less than an hour into the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When Racers discover that for the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history there is a double elimination, they are forced to step up their game. However, costly mistakes jeopardize multiple teams' chances at staying in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team is stranded in Indonesia as they watch their competition race by, and two Teams join forces to push through a mind-numbing mental challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle with an underwater challenge which threatens their positions in the game, and one team’s love for the outdoors comes in handy during a tough climbing challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Fearing they have broken the rules, one team takes a risk that could cost them the Race. Meanwhile, an unwanted speed bump turns into a dream excursion for Liz and Marie, but will it push them even farther back.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After falling to the back of the pack, a disheartened racer is encouraged by the spirit of the local workers, and it’s an intense foot race to the first-ever Pit Stop in Malawi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Malawi where a puzzling patriotic Roadblock causes one team to fall behind. Also, with a Double U-Turn on the line, teams must choose whether to sabotage their fellow Racers for a chance at first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race travels to Copenhagen for the first time, where one Racer learns the meaning of two left feet and a double U-turn jeopardizes team positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After a potentially game-changing error, one team hopes for a lucky break, and donning only a Speedo for their Detour task, Racers get in touch with their inner exhibitionists.
